title: Paletted Pigment
description: Adds CMYK subtractive dye mixing and more ways to obtain dyes
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a2687dea7baf020b8975b1153906e9a9095acec.png)
# Paletted Pigment  
Adds [CMYK subtractive](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Subtractive_color) dye mixing. Flowchart in [gallery](https://modrinth.com/datapack/paletted-pigment/gallery). Also allows you to make dyes from the following items:
- White
  - Nether Quartz (crafting)
- Black
  - Coal & Charcoal (crafting)
- Brown
  - Brown Mushroom (crafting)
- Red
  - Redstone Dust (crafting)
  - Crimson Fungus (crafting)
  - Red Mushroom (crafting)
  - Crimson Roots (crafting)
  - Fire Coral & Fan (smelting)
- Orange
  - Resin Clump (crafting)
- Yellow
  - Horn Coral & Fan (smelting)
- Lime
  - Big & Small Dripleaf (smelting)
- Cyan
  - Warped Fungus (crafting)
  - Glow Ink Sac (crafting)
  - Warped Roots (crafting)
- Blue
  - Tube Coral & Fan (smelting)
- Purple
  - Amethyst Shard (crafting)
- Magenta
  - Spore Blossom (crafting)
  - Bubble Coral & Fan (smelting)
- Pink
  - Cherry Sapling (crafting)
  - Brain Coral & Fan (smelting)
---
[![carrd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c1e434616c5dc5248b0c278bc90516938dea598.png)](https://sage-axolotl.carrd.co/)
